item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 12s Stable Tour: Richard Hannon
'She's our best three-year-old filly and we'll work back from Royal Ascot'
Richard Hannon talks Peter Thomas through his powerful team for 2026
Read with Racing Post+ De racingpost.com 4

item.title: paddypower: Paddy Power @paddypower · 14min Arsenal can't score unless it comes from a set piece or the goalkeeper trying to boot it
item.description: Paddy Power @paddypower · 14min Arsenal can't score unless it comes from a set piece or the goalkeeper trying to boot it out. That's the rules. 5 4 55 9 mil
